news.headline: Assaí reports R$80.6B revenue in 2024, up 10.7% from previous year, hitting R$22B in 4Q24. Profits grow 8.3%.
news.summary: In São Paulo on February 20, 2025, Assaí exceeded its annual guidance by achieving an 8.3% increase in profit. The company closed the year 2024 with a gross revenue of R$80.6 billion, marking a significant growth of 10.7% compared to the previous year. The fourth quarter of 2024 saw revenue peaking at R$22 billion, indicating a 9.4% increase from the previous quarter. This substantial growth in revenue showcases...

news.headline: 111 Inc. (NASDAQ: YI) will announce Q4 and FY2024 financial results on March 20, 2025. Conference call to follow.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Shanghai, 111, Inc. (NASDAQ: YI), a prominent tech-enabled healthcare platform company, revealed its dedication to transforming the healthcare industry value chain in China. The company aims to empower both upstream and downstream sectors through digital means.

news.headline: TNL Mediagene (NASDAQ: TNMG) appoints Marcus Brauchli from North Base Media as Board Chair for global expansion.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, TNL Mediagene, a prominent digital media and technology group in Asia trading on NASDAQ under the symbol TNMG, revealed the appointment of Marcus Brauchli as the Chair of the Board. Brauchli, co-founder and managing partner of North Base Media, will step into this role, leading the company's strategic decisions and direction. This move signifies a significant development for TNL Mediagene, headquartered in New York and with operations in Tokyo and Taipei.

news.headline: RPI Consultants awards annual scholarship to Beyioku Mary Oluwamayowa for 2024. Promotes future data and analytics leader.
news.summary: In Baltimore on February 20, 2025, RPI Consultants, a renowned ERP implementation, optimization, and software company, proudly revealed that Beyioku Mary Oluwamayowa has been selected as the recipient of the 2024 Annual Scholarship Award. The award recognizes Beyioku's commitment to ongoing enhancement and stood out among other candidates.

news.headline: Bilibili Inc. reports Q4 and FY 2024 financial results on Feb. 20, 2025. Iconic video community in China.
news.summary: In Shanghai, China, on February 20, 2025, Bilibili Inc. revealed its unaudited financial data for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024. Bilibili, recognized for being a prominent video community for China's youth, traded as NASDAQ: BILI and HKEX: 9626, showcased its performance in this period.

news.headline: Aeromexico partners with Viasat for faster in-flight Wi-Fi on Dreamliner fleet, replacing current system.
news.summary: Aeromexico has announced their decision to partner with Viasat for upgrading their in-flight connectivity system. The high-speed Wi-Fi solution from Viasat will be implemented to enhance the connectivity experience for passengers on Aeromexico's Dreamliner fleet. This upgrade is expected to significantly improve internet speeds for passengers while flying.

news.headline: Join Šiaulių Bankas webinar on Q4 and FY 2024, discussing financials and future plans.
Aurora Mobile integrates DeepSeek into Adpub platform for app monetization with advanced model. (Letter count: 91)
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Shenzhen, China, Aurora Mobile Limited revealed that it has integrated DeepSeek, a state-of-the-art large language model, into its Adpub platform. Aurora Mobile, known for its customer engagement and marketing technology services in China and listed on NASDAQ as JG, made this move to transform app monetization. By incorporating DeepSeek's advanced features, such as its lightweight structure and domain-specific optimizations, the company aims to provide unparalleled efficiency, scalability, and accuracy within its platform.

news.headline: Eurozone Construction Output MoM Actual 0% (Forecast -, Previous 1.16%, Revised 0.6%)
Plasmatreat releases REDOX-Tool, a plasma technology for oxide layer removal in the electronics industry, eliminating chemicals.
news.summary: In the small town of Steinhagen in Germany, on February 20, 2025, Plasmatreat, a prominent company specializing in plasma technology for surface treatment, introduced the REDOX-Tool. This innovative tool offers a sustainable and chemical-free method for eliminating oxide layers from metal surfaces. The REDOX-Tool by Plasmatreat aims to provide a more environmentally friendly solution to industries, marking a significant development in the field.

news.headline: Kraken exchange complied with 57% of 6,826 data requests from agencies like FBI and SEC in 2024.
news.summary: In the past year, Kraken exchange, headquartered in San Francisco, disclosed data in response to 57% of the 6,826 total requests received from regulators and enforcement agencies worldwide.

news.headline: Mercedes-Benz AG reports strong 2024 results and unveils largest product launch program.
news.summary: Mercedes-Benz Group AG, identified by the ticker symbol MBG, announced strong financial performance for 2024 in Stuttgart, Germany. The company also revealed extensive plans for its largest product and technology launch program to date, along with performance improvement initiatives aimed at providing significant value to both customers and shareholders. Emphasizing their commitment to upholding the legacy of the renowned brand, Mercedes-Benz aims to maximize its potential through these strategic endeavors.

news.headline: IAEA's Grossi: Iran nuclear deal not fit for purpose - Tass.
Oncoinvent ASA to present Q4 2024 results on Feb 27, 2025 at 07:30 CET. Full year and fourth quarter performance to be released.
news.summary: In Norway's capital city of Oslo, Oncoinvent has announced that on Thursday, February 27, 2025, at 07:30 CET, they will be releasing key information in connection with their full-year and fourth quarter 2024 results. This will include a stock exchange notification, press release, and quarterly report. The event is significant for stakeholders and investors, providing essential details about the company's financial performance.

news.headline: Tineco introduces new FLOOR ONE S7 STRETCH Ultra, an upgrade of the S6 vacuum cleaner. Available from Feb 20, 2025.
news.summary: NEUSS, Germany - Tineco, a prominent maker of smart home appliances, has recently announced the launch of the upgraded FLOOR ONE S7 STRETCH Ultra wet/dry vacuum cleaner, a successor to the popular FLOOR ONE STRETCH S6 model. This improved version offers enhanced features and usability compared to its predecessor. Available from February 20, 2025, the new appliance aims to provide customers with a more advanced cleaning experience. Tineco's expansion of its intelligent wet/dry vacuum cleaner line signifies the brand's commitment to innovation and meeting consumer needs.

news.headline: eDreams ODIGEO reports +70% quarterly profit growth, gaining 7 million subscribers with +26% increase.
news.summary: In Barcelona, Spain, eDreams ODIGEO, a prominent travel subscription company and major e-commerce firm in Europe, has disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter and nine months concluding on 31 December 2024. Demonstrating robust advancement, the company’s subscription model was pivotal in fueling growth. Notably, their Prime now program has seen exceptional success, with membership numbers surpassing 7 million following a remarkable surge of 26% during the third quarter alone, hitting 6.8 million members by the end of the period.

news.headline: EU digital and security commissioner Virkkunen: The commission will this year propose at least five packages to ease digital regulation
Coinbase CEO supports trading meme coins regardless of quality, following market-driven approach for customer choice and transparency.
news.summary: Brian Armstrong, CEO of Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN), announced that the cryptocurrency exchange will adopt a market-driven approach towards meme coins, allowing users to trade even “low quality” tokens if they wish. Armstrong stressed the importance of customer choice and transparency in light of an increase in meme coin launches. He stated, “We believe in free market capitalism. If our customers want it, and it’s legal, we aim to let them make that choice for themselves.” The top executive of the largest cryptocurrency trading platform in the U.S. highlighted their role in providing users with comprehensive information to facilitate informed decision-making rather than imposing recommendations on specific investments.

news.headline: VeChain incorporates Privy for easy social logins and dApp creation, enhancing user experience and interface.
news.summary: VeChain has integrated Privy-powered social logins into the VeChain Kit to streamline dApp development and user onboarding with a more intuitive interface. This enhancement aims to facilitate easier access to VeChain's platform and services.

news.headline: EUR/USD shows potential for one-sided growth in 3-minute MLIV report.
CEO of Lloyds highlights motor financing case causing uncertainty.
Fospha's research uncovers the hidden impact of DTC ads on platforms like TikTok, Meta, and YouTube on Amazon sales.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by Fospha, a comprehensive marketing measurement platform, has unveiled groundbreaking findings related to the "halo effect" in marketing. This phenomenon refers to the hidden influence of direct-to-consumer (DTC) advertising on sales through platforms such as TikTok, Meta, and Youtube. The research, released on Feb. 20, 2025, highlights the previously unrecognized impact of DTC advertising on these channels. This study provides a quantifiable understanding of how these advertising efforts directly impact sales performance, shedding light on the effectiveness of marketing strategies in the digital realm.

news.headline: NetEase Cloud Music Inc. (HKEX: 9899) reveals strong financial results for fiscal year 2024. Full details released.
news.summary: In Hangzhou, China, on February 20, 2025, NetEase Cloud Music Inc. disclosed its financial outcomes for the fiscal year 2024 concluding on December 31, 2024. The Company, recognized for its interactive music streaming services in China, operates under the stock symbol HKEX: 9899. Some significant financial figures for the year include revenue reaching [specific amount], a [percentage increase or decrease] from the previous year. Additionally, the net profit stood at [specific amount], showing [percentage increase or decrease] compared to the prior fiscal year. The Company highlighted other essential financial metrics such as [specific metric] and [specific metric], demonstrating its performance and growth in the competitive music streaming industry.

news.headline: METLEN Energy & Metals reports €5,683 million turnover in 2024, reaching new record-high EBITDA and strong Net Profit levels.
news.summary: METLEN (RIC: MYTr.AT) announced their 2024 financial results showcasing impressive growth. The company achieved a record-high EBITDA with consistent strong levels of turnover and net profit. In 2024, their turnover reached €5,683 million, a notable increase from €5,492 million in 2023. This success is reflected in their stock performance, with Bloomberg (MYTIL.GA) and ADR (MYTHY US) also demonstrating positive trends. The results indicate METLEN's significant financial progress and stability in the market.

news.headline: Expert Muneeb Ali predicts the demise of most Bitcoin L2 projects in 3 years as Bitcoin surpasses Ethereum and Solana.
news.summary: Muneeb Ali, co-founder of Stacks, has cautioned that the majority of Bitcoin Layer 2 projects may disappear within the next three years. He emphasized this prediction amidst Bitcoin's increasing dominance over Ethereum and Solana in the crypto space.

news.headline: Autohome Inc. reports unaudited Q4 2024 results, leading online auto destination in China. Stock tickers: NYSE: ATHM; HKEX: 2518.
news.summary: In Beijing, on February 20, 2025, Autohome Inc. (NYSE: ATHM; HKEX: 2518), the top online platform for car consumers in China, disclosed its unaudited financial results for the final quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Kremlin on possible prisoner exchange with the US: We have resumed talks on all issues including this one
TrinaTracker to open new manufacturing plant in Saudi Arabia, advancing localization strategy. Operations begin in Q1 2025.
news.summary: In JEDDAH, Saudi Arabia, TrinaTracker, a renowned provider of intelligent solar tracking technologies under Trinasolar Co. Ltd (SHA: 688599), revealed plans to open a new production plant in the country. This facility is scheduled to commence operations in the first quarter of 2025, showcasing the company's commitment to expanding its manufacturing capacity in the region.

news.headline: Hong Kong Pharma Digital partners with Chinese e-commerce platform to improve logistics services for millions of consumers.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Hong Kong Pharma Digital Technology Holdings Limited announced a new partnership with a prominent e-commerce platform catering to hundreds of millions of users. The cooperation agreement is set to reshape cross-border commerce and digital technology landscape.

Kremlin: New prisoner exchanges with the US is possible - IFX
HKMA cautions public about suspicious website linked to DBS Bank HK. Stay vigilant against scams. #RiskAlert #HKfinance
news.summary: A cautionary notice has been released by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority concerning a dubious website linked to DBS Bank (Hong Kong) Limited. Individuals are being advised to remain vigilant against possible scams and fraudulent activities. It is crucial for the public to exercise caution when interacting with online platforms to safeguard their finances and personal information.

news.headline: NVIDIA's Evo 2 innovates genomic modeling with AI, analyzing biomolecular sequences for biological research, enhancing applications.
news.summary: The latest release from NVIDIA, Evo 2, brings revolutionary progress in genomic modeling by utilizing artificial intelligence to examine and produce biomolecular sequences across multiple species. This innovation is set to significantly improve biological research and its applications.

news.headline: Introducing Grok 3 Beta: X.ai's powerful reasoning agent model demonstrates advanced abilities, revolutionizing AI tech. Explore more.
news.summary: x.ai has recently launched Grok 3 Beta, a cutting-edge reasoning agent model known for its advanced capabilities. This innovative AI technology has been extensively pre-trained and is making waves in the industry. Explore the transformative effects of this technology by learning more about it.

news.headline: Sui transforms gaming with advanced blockchain tech for asset ownership, dynamic NFTs, & enhanced experiences, empowering developers.
news.summary: Discover how Sui is revolutionizing Web3 games by incorporating blockchain technology to ensure asset ownership, facilitate dynamic NFTs, and provide fully onchain experiences. This innovative approach empowers developers with new opportunities in gaming, creating a more immersive and secure environment.

news.headline: AI boosts business with conversation intelligence by extracting insights from customer interactions, enhancing sales and service quality in 2025.
news.summary: Discover how the implementation of AI-powered conversation intelligence is revolutionizing business functions by analyzing valuable insights from customer interactions. This innovative technology is showing significant improvements in sales performance, as well as enhancing the quality of services provided. By leveraging this AI-driven tool, organizations can efficiently understand customer needs and preferences, leading to enhanced business outcomes.

news.headline: Arkham Exchange debuts points system for traders, rewarding based on volume. VIPs get 10% boost and conversion choices.
news.summary: Arkham Exchange has implemented a new points system for its users, which rewards them according to their trading volume. In addition to regular rewards, VIP users are entitled to extra perks such as a 10% increase in rewards and the option to convert their points into other benefits.

PBOC vows to optimize real estate financial policies.

PBOC vows to help real estate market to stabilize and stem the decline in the housing market

PBOC supports building a new model for real estate development
Scania and DHL to test Electric Truck with Fuel-Powered Range Extender as interim solution till fully electric trucks scale. EREV to be deployed by Post & Parcel Germany in Feb 2025.
news.summary: An interim solution to the scaling of fully electric trucks and the development of charging infrastructure could be the use of electric vehicles with fuel-powered range extenders. A Jointly developed Extended Range Electric Vehicle (EREV) is planned to be deployed by the Post & Parcel Germany division beginning in February 2025. This initiative aims to address the challenges of transitioning to electric vehicles, with the EREV providing a temporary solution.

news.headline: Zealand Pharma reveals full-year 2024 financial results, showcasing strong performance.
Mansa, a fintech backed by Tether, secures $10M for stablecoin-based payments; stablecoins hit $15.6T in transactions, surpassing Visa and Mastercard.
news.summary: In 2024, the annual transaction value of stablecoins exceeded $15.6 trillion, which is approximately 119% of Visa's transaction value and 200% of Mastercard's transaction value for the same period.

news.headline: PUMA recognized for sustainability efforts by CDP with top scores: A in climate, A- in water, and forest.
news.summary: German sports brand PUMA has notably enhanced its sustainability ratings per global environmental non-profit CDP. The company received top marks for its climate policy, maintaining an A ranking. In the areas of water security and forests, PUMA has significantly improved, moving to an A- from previous scores of B and C respectively. These advancements position PUMA at a ‘leadership level’ across all aspects evaluated by CDP.

news.headline: BITO Lagertechnik and Locus Robotics partner to transform warehouse automation in global market. Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: A partnership has been established between BITO Lagertechnik, a key player in storage and order-picking systems worldwide, and Locus Robotics, a leading provider of AI-driven warehouse automation. The collaboration, announced on Feb. 20, 2025, centers on enhancing warehouse operations.Both companies bring their expertise to the table: BITO Lagertechnik excels in innovative storage solutions, while Locus Robotics is renowned for its AI-driven automation systems. This partnership aims to combine their strengths to revolutionize warehouse efficiency. The agreement is expected to significantly impact the industry due to the global reach and influence of both companies.

news.headline: European Payment Study by BearingPoint shows cash decline, with 69%, 73%, and 57% usage in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland. Digital euro appealing to one in three Europeans.
news.summary: In a recent European Payment Study conducted by BearingPoint, notable changes in payment trends across nine European nations have been unveiled. The data highlights the ongoing decline of cash transactions throughout the continent. Notably, German-speaking countries such as Germany, Austria, and Switzerland still heavily favor cash, with cash transactions constituting 69%, 73%, and 57% of all transactions within each country, respectively. This study indicates a shifting landscape towards alternative payment methods in Europe.

news.headline: New Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick echoes Trump's proposal to abolish IRS and have outsiders pay taxes. Trump aims to eliminate federal income taxes.
news.summary: Howard Lutnick, recently appointed as Commerce Secretary in President Donald Trump's administration, has reiterated the President's proposal to abolish the Internal Revenue Service (IRS). Lutnick discussed this during an interview on Fox News, where he shared Trump's goal of implementing an External Revenue Service to replace the IRS, shifting the tax burden to external entities. Additionally, in an earlier event in January in Doral, Florida, Trump had suggested the idea of eliminating federal income taxes entirely. The announcement of these plans has caused significant buzz and discussions among the public and policymakers. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
